decisions.decision: Assert path elements have non-empty `d` attributes and correct stroke colors, NOT exact path coordinate strings
alternatives_rejected: Exact SVG path `d` string assertions — couples component test to buildLinePath internals already tested in chartUtils.test.ts

decisions.decision: Use plain render() from @testing-library/react, no providers needed
alternatives_rejected: renderWithProviders — unnecessary since PriceChart has no context/routing/query dependencies

decisions.decision: Test responsive sizing by asserting SVG viewBox, style.width='100%', style.height='auto', style.minWidth, and wrapper div overflow
alternatives_rejected: Skip sizing tests entirely — responsive sizing was explicitly requested
Test actual reflow behavior — impossible in jsdom

decisions.decision: Verify stroke/fill colors match getOutcomeColor(index) by importing the function in the test, not hardcoding hex values
alternatives_rejected: Hardcoded hex strings — brittle if palette changes
Only test distinctness — too weak, misses integration with getOutcomeColor

decisions.decision: Assert exact formatted Y-axis label strings ('0.0%', '25.0%', '50.0%', '75.0%', '100.0%') matching VolumeChart test pattern
alternatives_rejected: Only assert text elements exist — misses integration with formatProbability

decisions.decision: Follow VolumeChart.test.tsx pattern: factory function for mock data, container.querySelectorAll for SVG elements, screen.getByTestId for root
alternatives_rejected: Custom testing approach — consistency with existing test suite is preferred

steps.task: Create PriceChart.test.tsx with imports, mock data factory (makeSeries helper producing MarketAnalyticsSeries), and test suite scaffold
Add test: renders SVG with data-testid='price-chart' and role='img' aria-label
Add test: renders correct number of <path> elements (one per series with >1 point) and <circle> elements (one per data point across all series)
Add test: path stroke and circle fill colors match getOutcomeColor(index) for each series
Add test: path elements have non-empty `d` attribute (SVG path generation works without asserting exact coordinates)
Add test: Y-axis renders gridline labels '100.0%', '75.0%', '50.0%', '25.0%', '0.0%' using formatProbability
Add test: X-axis renders time labels using formatTimestampLabel for computed tick positions
Add test: responsive sizing — SVG has viewBox='0 0 760 320', style width/height/minWidth attributes set correctly
Add test: empty state (series=[]) renders chart frame (SVG, axes, gridlines) without paths or circles
Add test: legend renders outcome names with colored dots matching getOutcomeColor(index)
Run vitest on PriceChart.test.tsx to verify all tests pass, fix any failures
